_publications._publicationTitle: A High-Throughput Screening Platform Identifies Novel Combination Treatments for Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors

_contextSnippet: The treatment caused the final tumor volume in mice to be seven times lower than the vehicle in the sporadic model after eighteen days of treatment
details: MK-1775 with Doxorubicin reduced final tumor volume 7 times lower than vehicle after 18 days treatment
